name: BhartERP Reorder Level Alert
script:
if doc.actual_qty <= (doc.reorder_level or 0) and doc.reorder_level > 0: item_name = frappe.db.get_value('Item', doc.item_code, 'item_name') or doc.item_code reorder_qty = frappe.db.get_value('Item', doc.item_code, 'reorder_qty') or 0 purchase_managers = frappe.db.get_all( 'Has Role', filters={'role': 'Purchase Manager', 'parenttype': 'User'}, fields=['parent'] ) for pm in purchase_managers: try: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[pm.parent], subject=f'⚠ BhartERP Low Stock: {item_name} ({doc.warehouse})', message=f'''

⚠ Low Stock Alert

Item: {item_name} ({doc.item_code})
Warehouse: {doc.warehouse}
Current Qty: {doc.actual_qty}
Reorder Level: {doc.reorder_level}
Reorder Qty: {reorder_qty}

Please create a Material Request or Purchase Order immediately.

— BhartERP · Paisape Techfin Private Limited

''' ) except Exception: pass
